name: Turkey and Rice Soup
recipeIngredient: 8 cups chicken stock, or turkey stock
1/2 teaspoon hot pepper sauce, to taste
2 cups cooked turkey breast meat, small dice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add onion and chopped vegetables. Cook 5 minutes or until the onion is soft.
3. Add rice and stir well.
4. Add tomatoes, stock, salt, hot pepper sauce, basil, oregano, and thyme.
5. Bring to boil over medium-high heat.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until rice is tender.
7. Stir in cooked turkey.
8. Add more stock if desired.
9. Heat 1 minute.
